page_title: Texas Hyperscale Data Center Infrastructure | CloudTelc
meta_description: Texas leads the US with 3.4GW capacity. CloudTelc provides expert site selection, high-voltage power & fiber connectivity for hyperscale AI data centers in DFW, Houston, and beyond.

structured_data.description: Specializing in the 48GW expansion of Texas's data center market, focusing on power, fiber, and site preparation.
